description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint and an open-plan interior layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, featuring large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The house includes a spacious kitchen, dining area, living room, multiple bedrooms, and bathrooms, all arranged for efficient flow. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The main entryway is defined by a set of double glass doors, with no visible porch or overhang, emphasizing clean lines and minimalism. Interior furnishings are visible through the windows, including tables, chairs, beds, and cabinetry, suggesting a fully furnished and functional residence.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, minimalist design. The layout is open-plan with visible living, dining, and bedroom areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway with double glass doors, large windows, and a clear view into the dining and living areas.
description_view_1: This angle shows the kitchen, dining area, and a bedroom, with multiple large windows and a focus on the open-plan interior.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible here, featuring additional windows, a secondary entry, and a view into the bedrooms and living spaces.
description_view_3: This side displays the kitchen, a workspace, and more windows, with a clear view of the interior layout and furnishings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with no porch or overhang, minimalistic and flush with the facade
